meaning: 尼西亚(小亚细亚西北部古城)
examples: In that year, the Council of Nicaea was convened by emperor Constantine.
Another little known fact is the Emperor Constantine had no voting power at the council - he was there merely as an observer. [Canons of the council of Nicaea].
In 325, the Council Of Nicaea ended with the adoption of the Nicene Creed, establishing the doctrine of the Holy Trinity.
